title: UTA Board Detail
description: Per-slot drill-in. Trends for every promoted interlude metric, latest-snapshot tables for LUs / bad blocks / SSR / SDI / DTT / TurboWrite, and a metric explorer over the long-form sidecar.

list.name: slot_id
list.label: Slot
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT slot_id FROM uta.test_sessions FINAL WHERE slot_id != '' ORDER BY slot_id

list.name: log_filename
list.label: Log File
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT log_filename FROM uta.test_sessions FINAL WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' ORDER BY last_seen_at DESC

list.name: metric
list.label: Sidecar metric
list.description: Pick any of the ~300 keys captured in interlude_metrics.
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT key FROM uta.interlude_metrics WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND value_num IS NOT NULL ORDER BY key

targets.rawSql: SELECT log_filename, slot_id, rack, shelf, slot, started_at, status, snapshot_count, last_snapshot_at, controller, replaceAll(interface, '_', ' ') AS interface, fw_arch, nand_type, nand_density, manufacturer, package_density, patch_version, release_candidate, firmware_version, arrayStringConcat(engineers, ', ') AS engineers, test_purpose, storage_type, execution_type, project FROM uta.test_sessions FINAL WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') ORDER BY last_seen_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT toString(status) AS status FROM uta.test_sessions FINAL WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' ORDER BY last_seen_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT count() FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND block_started_at >= $__fromTime AND block_started_at <= $__toTime

SELECT countIf(block_status = 'FAILED') FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND block_started_at >= $__fromTime AND block_started_at <= $__toTime
SELECT wai, waf FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') ORDER BY block_started_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT temp_case AS case, temp_thermal_value AS thermal, temp_nanddts AS nanddts FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') ORDER BY block_started_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT free_block_cnt_xlc AS xlc, free_block_cnt_slc AS slc FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') ORDER BY block_started_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT block_started_at AS time, wai AS WAI, waf AS WAF FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND block_started_at >= $__fromTime AND block_started_at <= $__toTime ORDER BY block_started_at

SELECT block_started_at AS time, ec_slc_max AS Max, ec_slc_min AS Min, ec_slc_avg AS Avg FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND block_started_at >= $__fromTime AND block_started_at <= $__toTime ORDER BY block_started_at

SELECT block_started_at AS time, ec_mlc_max AS Max, ec_mlc_min AS Min, ec_mlc_avg AS Avg FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND block_started_at >= $__fromTime AND block_started_at <= $__toTime ORDER BY block_started_at

SELECT block_started_at AS time, init_bb AS Init, rt_bb AS RT, reserved_bb AS Reserved FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND block_started_at >= $__fromTime AND block_started_at <= $__toTime ORDER BY block_started_at

SELECT block_started_at AS time, free_block_cnt_xlc AS xLC, free_block_cnt_slc AS SLC FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND block_started_at >= $__fromTime AND block_started_at <= $__toTime ORDER BY block_started_at

SELECT block_started_at AS time, total_nand_write_bytes AS Write, total_nand_erase_bytes AS Erase FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND block_started_at >= $__fromTime AND block_started_at <= $__toTime ORDER BY block_started_at

SELECT block_started_at AS time, temp_case AS Case, temp_thermal_value AS Thermal, temp_nanddts AS NANDDTS FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND block_started_at >= $__fromTime AND block_started_at <= $__toTime ORDER BY block_started_at

SELECT block_started_at AS time, latency_max_us AS Max, latency_avg_us AS Avg, latency_min_us AS Min FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND block_started_at >= $__fromTime AND block_started_at <= $__toTime ORDER BY block_started_at

SELECT block_started_at AS time, ftl_open_count AS FTLOpen, read_reclaim_count AS ReadReclaim FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND block_started_at >= $__fromTime AND block_started_at <= $__toTime ORDER BY block_started_at

SELECT block_started_at AS time, ssr_received_pon_count AS PON, ssr_received_spo_count AS SPO FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND block_started_at >= $__fromTime AND block_started_at <= $__toTime ORDER BY block_started_at

panels.title: IO counters (Reset / POR / PMC / total / read / write)

targets.rawSql: SELECT block_started_at AS time, reset_count AS Reset, por_count AS POR, pmc_count AS PMC, io_total AS IoTotal, read_io AS ReadIo, write_io AS WriteIo FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND block_started_at >= $__fromTime AND block_started_at <= $__toTime ORDER BY block_started_at

panels.title: Sidecar metric — ${metric}
panels.description: Plot any of the ~300 captured FW variables. Pick from the 'Sidecar metric' dropdown.

targets.rawSql: SELECT block_started_at AS time, value_num AS "${metric}" FROM uta.interlude_metrics WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND key = '${metric:raw}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND block_started_at >= $__fromTime AND block_started_at <= $__toTime ORDER BY block_started_at

WITH latest AS (SELECT variables FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') ORDER BY block_started_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT JSONExtractString(arr, 'id') AS id, JSONExtractString(arr, 'Type') AS type, JSONExtractString(arr, 'Length') AS length, JSONExtractString(arr, 'Provisioning') AS provisioning, JSONExtractString(arr, 'Data_Reliability') AS reliability, JSONExtractString(arr, 'Write_Protect') AS write_protect, JSONExtractString(arr, 'TurboWriteBufferUnits') AS tw_buffer FROM latest ARRAY JOIN JSONExtractArrayRaw(variables, 'lus') AS arr

panels.title: Latest snapshot — Plane Bad Block heatmap

targets.rawSql: WITH latest AS (SELECT variables FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') ORDER BY block_started_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT JSONExtractInt(arr, 'ch') AS ch, JSONExtractInt(arr, 'way') AS way, JSONExtractInt(arr, 'die') AS die, JSONExtractInt(arr, 'plane') AS plane, JSONExtractInt(arr, 'init_bb') AS init_bb, JSONExtractInt(arr, 'rt_bb') AS rt_bb, JSONExtractInt(arr, 'init_bb') + JSONExtractInt(arr, 'rt_bb') AS init_plus_rt FROM latest ARRAY JOIN JSONExtractArrayRaw(variables, 'plane_bb') AS arr ORDER BY ch, way, die, plane

WITH latest AS (SELECT variables FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') ORDER BY block_started_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT JSONExtractInt(arr, 'ch') AS ch, JSONExtractInt(arr, 'way') AS way, JSONExtractInt(arr, 'die') AS die, JSONExtractInt(arr, 'blk') AS blk, JSONExtractInt(arr, 'bad_type') AS bad_type, JSONExtractString(arr, 'bad_class') AS bad_class, JSONExtractInt(arr, 'actual_plane') AS actual_plane, JSONExtractInt(arr, 'borrowed_plane') AS borrowed_plane FROM latest ARRAY JOIN JSONExtractArrayRaw(variables, 'bad_blocks') AS arr ORDER BY ch, way, die, blk

WITH latest AS (SELECT snapshot_id FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') ORDER BY block_started_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT key, value_num, value_str, unit FROM uta.interlude_metrics WHERE snapshot_id IN (SELECT snapshot_id FROM latest) AND section = 'ssr' ORDER BY key

WITH latest AS (SELECT snapshot_id FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') ORDER BY block_started_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT key, value_num, value_str, unit FROM uta.interlude_metrics WHERE snapshot_id IN (SELECT snapshot_id FROM latest) AND section = 'dtt_parameter_read' ORDER BY key

WITH latest AS (SELECT snapshot_id FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') ORDER BY block_started_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT key, value_num, value_str, unit FROM uta.interlude_metrics WHERE snapshot_id IN (SELECT snapshot_id FROM latest) AND section = 'do_check_need_to_turbowrite_flush' ORDER BY key

SELECT block_started_at AS time, log_filename AS metric, block_status AS value FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND block_started_at >= $__fromTime AND block_started_at <= $__toTime ORDER BY block_started_at

panels.title: Raw log_events tail (outside-block lines)
panels.description: Recent raw lines from log_events for this slot/file — for context around interesting snapshots.

targets.rawSql: SELECT coalesce(log_timestamp, ingested_at) AS time, raw_line AS message FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime ORDER BY ingested_at DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT block_started_at, block_status, block_duration_s, variables FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') ORDER BY block_started_at DESC LIMIT 1
